data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194AE5:
That device you have there...
It's a POKéNAV.\pWhen TRAINERS that have POKéNAVS
battle, it keeps a record of how\lthings went, I think.\pOh, pardon me.
My name is STEVEN.\pI'm interested in rare stones, so
I travel here and there.\pOh?
A LETTER for me?
data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194BDD:
STEVEN: Okay, thank you.\pYou went through all this trouble to
deliver that. I need to thank you.\pLet me see...
I'll give you this TM.\pIt contains my favorite move,
STEEL WING.
data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194C8D: STEVEN: Your POKéMON appear quite\ncapable.\pIf you keep training, you could even\nbecome the CHAMPION of the POKéMON\lLEAGUE one day. That's what I think.\pNow, I've got to hurry along.
data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194D43: Oh, your BAG is full...\nThat's too bad, then.
